title: Senior Doctor - Columbia Asia - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Columbia Asia - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Columbia Asia has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Columbia Asia:
Columbia Asia is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Columbia Asia!
